summary_en: Update to capital cost and share price awareness management framework. Specific target metrics and horizon not disclosed in excerpt. Refer to attached document for detailed COC targets, measurement period, and payout-ratio floor if applicable.
title_en: Update on Response to Capital Cost and Share Price Awareness Management
translation_en_brief: Kawanishi Warehouse Co., Ltd. (ticker 9322, TSE Standard Market) issued an update on 15 May 2026 to its capital cost and share price awareness management framework. The company previously disclosed this framework on an unspecified date and has now published progress and refinements to the initiative. The announcement references an attached document containing detailed metrics and implementation status. Specific COC targets (such as ROE or operating margin thresholds), measurement horizons, payout-ratio floors, and other quantitative elements are contained in the attachment and not fully visible in the press release header.
